protein_cube.name: Protein Cube
protein_cube.description: Ship rations. Chewy, grey, keeps you upright.

star_ration.name: Star Ration
star_ration.description: A dense nutrient bar from a dockside stall. Tastes of nothing and everything.

stim_tea.name: Stim Tea
stim_tea.description: Grid-brewed and faintly luminous. Snaps you wide awake.

club_pass.name: Club Pass
club_pass.description: A night's entry to a Grid underground club.

training_band.name: Training Band
training_band.description: A resistance band for keeping in fighting shape.

match_ticket.name: Match Ticket
match_ticket.description: Front-row seat to a grav-ball derby.

sheet_music.name: Sheet Music
sheet_music.description: Hand-scored, from a Shallows street composer.

paper_book.name: Paper Book
paper_book.description: Actual paper. Actual ink. Increasingly rare.

rare_vinyl.name: Pressed Vinyl
rare_vinyl.description: An original pressing, warm and imperfect. Collectors weep.

first_edition.name: First Edition
first_edition.description: A first-edition novel, spine barely cracked.

aurora_pendant.name: Aurora Pendant
aurora_pendant.description: A shard of contained aurora that shifts to the wearer's mood. One of a kind.

nano_patch.name: Nano Patch
nano_patch.description: Military-grade trauma gel that knits you back together fast. Not sold topside.

charge_cell.name: Charge Cell
charge_cell.description: A humming capacitor that dumps straight into your weapon systems. Combat use only.

singing_crystal.name: Singing Crystal
singing_crystal.description: A shard from the deep vents that hums the last song it heard. It's still singing.

voidglass_rose.name: Voidglass Rose
voidglass_rose.description: A rose blown from voidglass on the lowest floors. It drinks the light and gives it back slowly, like it's savoring.

arc_blade.name: Arc Blade
arc_blade.description: A Grid duelist's edge, humming faintly. One gem socket.

voidglass_edge.name: Voidglass Edge
voidglass_edge.description: Cut from the Substrate's own dark glass. It remembers being part of something bigger.

neural_crown.name: Neural Crown
neural_crown.description: A circlet of dead processors that still dream a little. Two sockets.

substrate_weave.name: Substrate Weave
substrate_weave.description: Cloth that shouldn't exist, woven somewhere below floor six. Two sockets.

duelist_gauntlets.name: Duelist Gauntlets
duelist_gauntlets.description: Fitted, elegant, quietly armored. One socket.

mag_boots.name: Mag Boots
mag_boots.description: They hold the deck when the deck misbehaves.

grav_dancers.name: Grav Dancers
grav_dancers.description: Slippers that argue with gravity and usually win. One socket.

lucky_chip.name: Lucky Chip
lucky_chip.description: A casino chip from a place that burned down. Pure gem housing — two sockets.

ember_gem.name: Ember Gem
ember_gem.description: In a weapon: your strikes burn thermal. In armor: resists thermal.

frost_gem.name: Frost Gem
frost_gem.description: In a weapon: your strikes bite cryo. In armor: resists cryo.

volt_gem.name: Volt Gem
volt_gem.description: In a weapon: your strikes arc voltaic. In armor: resists voltaic.

venom_gem.name: Venom Gem
venom_gem.description: In a weapon: your strikes seep toxin. In armor: resists toxin.

psi_gem.name: Psi Gem
psi_gem.description: In a weapon: your strikes cut psionic. In armor: resists psionic.

surge_gem.name: Surge Gem
surge_gem.description: +1 starting charge and +1 max charge while socketed.

prisma_gem.name: Prisma Gem
prisma_gem.description: All six colors at once. In a weapon: your strikes find whatever the enemy fears most. In armor: resists everything.

empress_heart.name: Empress's Heart
empress_heart.description: It still beats, faintly, in time with the city. +5 attack, +5 defense, +25 max HP.

myomer_sleeves.name: Myomer Sleeves
myomer_sleeves.description: Muscle-fiber weave that pulls with you. One socket.

servo_legguards.name: Servo Legguards
servo_legguards.description: Assisted joints with a spring in the step. One socket.

signal_ring.name: Signal Ring
signal_ring.description: A slim band with a single gem housing. Buy two — you have two hands.

band_of_the_deep.name: Band of the Deep
band_of_the_deep.description: Voidglass ring, warm against all reason. One socket.

chrome_lipstick.name: Chrome Lipstick
chrome_lipstick.description: Found in the Substrate, still warm. Whoever owned it had excellent taste and terrible luck.

shard_gravity_snap.name: Data-Shard: Gravity Snap
shard_gravity_snap.description: A splinter of forbidden wetware code. Use it to burn Gravity Snap into your lace.

shard_time_stutter.name: Data-Shard: Time Stutter
shard_time_stutter.description: Clock-forking code the city banned twice. Use it to learn Time Stutter.

shard_mirror_ghost.name: Data-Shard: Mirror Ghost
shard_mirror_ghost.description: Sensory-echo routines, still warm from someone else's lace. Teaches Mirror Ghost.

shard_purge_cycle.name: Data-Shard: Purge Cycle
shard_purge_cycle.description: Medical-grade reboot code. Teaches Purge Cycle.

shard_overclock_lace.name: Data-Shard: Overclock Lace
shard_overclock_lace.description: Firmware with the safety limits commented out. Teaches Overclock Lace.

shard_cartographers_dream.name: Data-Shard: Cartographer's Dream
shard_cartographers_dream.description: Survey code that dreams in floor plans. Teaches Cartographer's Dream.

shard_phantom_hands.name: Data-Shard: Phantom Hands
shard_phantom_hands.description: Haptic projection code with a burglar's fingerprints all over it. Teaches Phantom Hands.

coolant_weave.name: Coolant Weave
coolant_weave.description: Microcapillary coolant threaded through the lace. Vents +6 heat per round.

smartlink_eyes.name: Smartlink Eyes
smartlink_eyes.description: Targeting overlays etched onto your corneas. +2 attack, +1 speed.

subdermal_plating.name: Subdermal Plating
subdermal_plating.description: Flexible armor grown under the skin. +3 defense, +5 max HP.

overclock_core.name: Overclock Core
overclock_core.description: A sternum-mounted compute block. +40 heat capacity for protocol work.

shard_siren_overlay.name: Data-Shard: Siren Overlay
shard_siren_overlay.description: Somebody weaponized wanting. Teaches Siren Overlay.

composure_spray.name: Composure Spray
composure_spray.description: Smells like cold showers and good decisions. Cleanses smitten, marked, weak knees, and charm mid-fight.

oceania_panopt.name: Oceania PanOpt Suite
oceania_panopt.description: Sees everything, forgets nothing, forgives you anyway. +4 attack, +3 speed, +5% dodge. Manufactured at Plant 7.

eurasia_atlas_frame.name: Eurasia Atlas Frame
eurasia_atlas_frame.description: The people's spine, now yours. +5 defense, +20 max HP. Manufactured at Plant 7.

eastasia_ghostlace.name: Eastasia Ghostlace
eastasia_ghostlace.description: Room for so much more of everything that isn't you. +30 heat cap, +5 heat vent. Manufactured at Plant 7.

pit_champions_belt.name: Pit Champion's Belt
pit_champions_belt.description: Scuffed chrome and someone else's blood, buffed to a shine. +2 attack, +2 defense.

voltage_halo.name: Voltage Halo
voltage_halo.description: Saint Voltage's blessing, worn above the brow: an arc-flash that never finishes. +2 defense, +10 max HP, one socket.

gravekeepers_signet.name: Gravekeeper's Signet
gravekeepers_signet.description: A little chrome headstone for a finger. Lull engraved it herself: 'NOT YET.' +2 speed, +5% dodge.

zenith_sigil.name: Zenith's Sigil
zenith_sigil.description: The crowd's love, cast in metal warm as applause. +3 attack, +3 defense, +3 speed, two sockets.

gutterware_coolant.name: Gutterware Coolant Sleeve
gutterware_coolant.description: A coolant sleeve with someone else's serial number filed off. Vents +2 heat per round. Probably sterile.

burner_blade.name: Burner Blade
burner_blade.description: A duelist's edge with three previous owners, none of whom retired. +4 attack, one socket.

flechette_pistol.name: Flechette Pistol
flechette_pistol.description: Military. Technically decommissioned. Technically. +6 attack, one socket.

ghostweave_vest.name: Ghostweave Vest
ghostweave_vest.description: Refraction mesh that remembers how not to be seen. +4 defense, +3% dodge.

warlord_frame.name: Warlord Frame
warlord_frame.description: Skeletal reinforcement from a war nobody admits to. +3 attack, +3 defense. Ask nothing.

midnight_gem.name: Midnight Gem
midnight_gem.description: Cut from something that shouldn't have facets. +2 attack, +2 defense, +2 speed while socketed.

founders_bell.name: Founder's Bell
founders_bell.description: A brass ship's bell the size of a fist, cut from the Pit's rope the night the founder finally lost. It doesn't ring for anyone else. Ondo pressed it into your hands like it weighed fifteen years.

skewered_something.name: Skewered Something
skewered_something.description: Nobody asks. It's char-sweet, it's hot, and the vendor's smile is completely sincere. Nyx has eaten four of these; being finite is delicious.

glow_broth.name: Glow Broth
glow_broth.description: Server-coolant green and faintly luminous. Tastes like midnight and white pepper. The bowl is a deposit.

static_floss.name: Static Floss
static_floss.description: Spun sugar that crackles against your teeth. Kids ask for double static.

vendors_mercy.name: Vendor's Mercy
vendors_mercy.description: The end-of-night box: whatever didn't sell, stacked with genuine tenderness. A whole meal for whoever needs one.

cyberlink.name: Cyberlink
cyberlink.description: Standard-issue neural interface, activated with your docking paperwork (it's on your tab). Messages, inventory ledger, city settings — the free tier of being a person here. Everyone has one. Nobody reads the EULA.

archivists_lens.name: Archivist's Lens
archivists_lens.description: Not a lens — a habit. Forty years of 'no fault found' distilled into knowing where not-quite-to-look. Somewhere in row nine, something is glad you learned.

tide_glass.name: Tide Glass
tide_glass.description: Sea-smoothed glass with a slow light inside, moving like something patient breathing. Found only in the flooded levels at slack water. Warm in the hand. Warmer when the tide is coming in.

ministry_prospectus.name: Ministry Holdings Prospectus (annotated)
ministry_prospectus.description: A corporate prospectus for a holding company that owns all three corps at once, margins inked over in a dead hand: 'the war is the product.' Someone carried this down and didn't carry it back.

primer_rhetoric.name: A Primer on Being Believed
primer_rhetoric.description: Thin, dog-eared, devastating. Read it once and it stays with you.

primer_lace.name: Cold Boot: A Field Manual
primer_lace.description: How to bring a dead system up clean. The margins argue with the text and win.

tome_nerve.name: On Standing Still
tome_nerve.description: A slim book about not running. It does not raise its voice.

codex_reflexes.name: The Body Remembers
codex_reflexes.description: Movement drills annotated by someone who clearly survived them.

tome_daemon.name: Daemoncraft, Vol. II
tome_daemon.description: The volume that teaches your lace a new trick outright. Vol. I is missing; you don't seem to need it.

folio_founders_1.name: The Founder's Library, Vol. I
folio_founders_1.description: One spine of four. Hidden when the college was nearly bought out, so the corps couldn't pulp what it said. Worth more whole.

folio_founders_2.name: The Founder's Library, Vol. II
folio_founders_2.description: One spine of four. Hidden when the college was nearly bought out, so the corps couldn't pulp what it said. Worth more whole.

folio_founders_3.name: The Founder's Library, Vol. III
folio_founders_3.description: One spine of four. Hidden when the college was nearly bought out, so the corps couldn't pulp what it said. Worth more whole.

folio_founders_4.name: The Founder's Library, Vol. IV
folio_founders_4.description: One spine of four. Hidden when the college was nearly bought out, so the corps couldn't pulp what it said. Worth more whole.
